sizing_rule.note: Risk fixed 4% of bankroll per trade. Core rule limits position size to psychological/financial tolerance with 40% max drawdown threshold. Emphasizes that larger losses require disproportionately larger gains to recover (66.7% gain needed to recover from 40% loss).

source_rule_text: A trader should limit position size based on the maximum drawdown they can psychologically and financially tolerate, because larger losses require disproportionately larger gains to recover, and consecutive losses can occur more frequently than probability suggests.
